title: Search Architecture Options
subtitle: Compare three implementation approaches before committing

sections.title: Approaches
sections.placeholder: Filter by risk, speed, or cost

items.title: SQL-first
items.body: Reuse existing query tables and add targeted indexes.

items.title: Incremental index
items.body: Create a small denormalized index maintained by jobs.

items.title: External search
items.body: Adopt a search service and sync data asynchronously.
